title: LLM API Cost Calculator
description: Calculate the cost in USD of an LLM API call given input/output token counts and per-million-token prices.
problem: Write calc_cost(input_tokens, output_tokens, input_price_per_million, output_price_per_million) returning total cost in USD rounded to 6 decimal places.
hint: cost = input_tokens/1_000_000 * input_price_per_million + output_tokens/1_000_000 * output_price_per_million, then round(cost, 6).
